generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller for horizontal (cart) movement of gantry crane"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the horizontal (cart) movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor controller for vertical (hoist) movement of gantry crane"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the vertical (hoist) movement of the gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic actuator for container pickup/drop operations on gantry crane"
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino board interfacing all sensors/controllers for real-time data collection and control coordination"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion angle for trajectory validation and fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed to detect wind-induced oscillations affecting crane stability"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based interface collecting data from electromagnet, swing encoder, and anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CombinedSensorData
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CombinedSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorInterface
]

// C5: Data Storage
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor/encoder readings for kinematic validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBService
]

instance WindData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements from anemometer for environmental impact analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBService
]

instance CombinedPhysicalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comprehensive time-series data collection including all physical measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBService
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real vs. simulated trajectory execution traces for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

// C10: Models
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model of gantry crane kinematics used for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital simulation model replicating physical dynamics for validation purposes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance CADFrameModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD model of gantry crane frame for spatial reference"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonCoreServices : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source Python module (gantrylib) providing core digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service deployment (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, MQTTBrokerService, DashboardService
]

instance TimescaleDBService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based TimescaleDB for time-series data logging and storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorEncoderData, WindData, CombinedPhysicalData
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for real-time and historical trajectory visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance CapellaModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella-based system engineering models for Arcadia framework integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KinematicModel
]

instance Fusion360CAD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 for CAD modeling of gantry crane components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADFrameModel
]

// C6: Digital Twin Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal trajectories using kinematic models with zero residual swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing physical dynamics simulation for validation against physical execution"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously comparing physical execution traces with simulations to detect deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker service handling real-time data communication between physical interfaces and digital twin"
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Database service managing time-series data storage in TimescaleDB"
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard service providing real-time visualization of crane operations"
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing time-series classification for fault detection (motor failures, encoder drift)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time and historical trajectory visualization with confidence bounds"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance ParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling HMI-based manual adjustments to trajectories or logging configurations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time generation of smooth, residual-free movement paths for gantry crane operations"
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of physical execution traces with simulations to detect deviations (distance metrics)"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of simulation accuracy against physical execution"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series classification identifying anomalies such as motor failures or encoder drift"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical visualization of crane trajectories with simulated confidence bounds"
]

instance OperationalFeedbackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation alerts operators to deviations like wind-induced oscillations"
]

instance ParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment capability via HMI for trajectories or logging configurations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C12: Physical System Environment
instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, ArduinoController,
        SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoSensorInterface
]

instance PhysicalInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ArduinoController
]

// C13: Physical Crane Interface
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python-based interface connecting Arduino sensors/controllers to digital twin data logging and validation services"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalDataCollectionService
]

instance PhysicalDataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service collecting physical data from sensors/controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin interacts with the physical system through:
  - **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematic model-driven optimal trajectory generation for smooth, residual-free movements),
  - **Simulation Service** (real-time simulation of crane dynamics to validate trajectories against physical execution),
  - **Control Application** (Python-based interface that executes generated trajectories via the physical crane’s motor controllers),
  - **Human Machine Interface (HMI)** (operator controls and real-time status monitoring, with feedback loops for fault detection and adjustments)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** scale:
  - **Data Logging**: Continuous, near-instantaneous updates to **TimescaleDB** (optimized for time-series data),
  - **Trajectory Generation**: Computed offline or in real-time based on current state, with minimal latency,
  - **Continuous Validation**: Runs in real-time, comparing physical and simulated trajectories with a threshold-based alerting mechanism,
  - **Simulation Service**: Runs in parallel to physical execution, with updates synchronized via MQTT."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is structured as:
  - **Physical Crane (PT)**: Central hardware system (frame, motors, controllers, sensors),
  - **Physical Crane Interface (Python)**: Acts as the bridge between PT and DT,
  - **Control Application (Python)**: Executes DT-generated trajectories on PT,
  - **Logging Application (Python)**: Collects and stores data in **TimescaleDB**,
  - **Human Machine Interface (Python)**: Operator interface for control and monitoring,
  - **Digital Twin Core**:
    - **Database (TimescaleDB)** for data storage,
    - **MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto)** for inter-service communication,
    - **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematic model-based),
    - **Simulation Service** (real-time physics simulation),
    - **Continuous Validation Service** (real-time deviation detection)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As Designed**: Kinematic CAD models (Autodesk Fusion 360) and Arcadia models (Capella) define ideal system behavior,
  - **As Manufactured**: Physical crane components (motors, controllers, sensors) are validated via Arduino-based interfacing,
  - **As Operated**: Real-time data logging, trajectory execution, and continuous validation ensure operational fidelity,
  - **Evolution**: Uses **DarTwin notation** for tracking system upgrades (e.g., harbor system extensions, Capella model integration)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Kinematic models and simulation service validate trajectory generation,
  - **Validation**:
    - **Continuous Validation Service** compares physical execution traces with simulations using distance metrics,
    - **Threshold-based alerts** notify operators of deviations,
  - **Uncertainty Handling**:
    - Wind speed (anemometer) introduces variability in hoist dynamics,
    - Encoder measurements account for mechanical tolerances,
  - **Validation Methods**: Reuses existing model validation techniques (e.g., [5]), extended with time-series classification for fault localization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections use:
  - **MQTT Protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto)** for real-time signaling between services,
  - **Python APIs** for PT-DT communication (Physical Crane Interface, Control Application),
  - **Database API (TimescaleDB)** for historical data logging,
  - **Docker Networking** for containerized service orchestration,
  - **HTTP/REST** for Grafana dashboard integration (via data source plugins)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed on a **single personal computer** via:
  - **Docker Compose** for container orchestration (Database, MQTT Broker, Dashboard),
  - **Python Module (gantrylib)** for core services,
  - **First-Time Setup**: Docker compose handles database/dashboard initialization automatically,
  - **Scalability**: Services can be extended via modular Python modules or containerized additions."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The digital twin has **limited horizontal integration**:
  - **Harbor System Extensions**: Used in teaching to expand to container identification and ship buoyancy models,
  - **External Systems**: No explicit integration with other digital twins or external IoT platforms mentioned,
  - **Data Exchange**: Primarily within the crane’s own ecosystem (MQTT, TimescaleDB), with potential for future extensions."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **centralized to the physical crane operator**:
  - **Physical Crane Data**: Logged to **TimescaleDB** under operator control,
  - **Service Data**: Generated by DT services (trajectories, simulations) but stored in the same database,
  - **Privacy**: No explicit mention of encryption or anonymization; data is accessible via open-source tools (Python, Grafana)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin follows **ad-hoc, open-source standards**:
  - **Digital Twin Framework**: No commercial framework (e.g., Eclipse Ditto/BaSyx) is used; services are built with generic tools (Python, Docker, MQTT),
  - **Modeling**: Uses **Capella (Arcadia)** for system engineering and **Autodesk Fusion 360** for CAD,
  - **Data Formats**: TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-compatible) and MQTT for inter-service communication,
  - **Future Potential**: Could adopt **AutomationML** (as seen in related work) for industry integration."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Remote Operation**: HMI allows operator control from anywhere via the deployed system,
  - **Fault Detection**: Continuous validation and time-series classification prevent catastrophic failures,
  - **Physical Safety**: No explicit mention of human-in-the-loop safety protocols (e.g., emergency stops), but real-time monitoring mitigates risks,
  - **Data Integrity**: TimescaleDB ensures reliable logging, but no encryption or access controls are described for sensitive data."
]
